user.title: Configure CalitateAer Romania (RNMCA)
user.description: Enter your RNMCA API credentials. You can obtain API access by contacting RNMCA through their website at calitateaer.ro.

stations.title: Select Monitoring Stations
stations.description: Select one or more air quality monitoring stations to track. You can find the stations on the map at calitateaer.ro.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Please check your username and password.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to calitateaer.ro server. Please check your internet connection.
error.no_stations_selected: Please select at least one monitoring station.
error.unknown: Unknown error occurred. Check Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This CalitateAer account is already configured.

init.title: CalitateAer Options
init.description: Configure options for the CalitateAer integration.
